mission.title: vitess: Bug Report: empty ListShardTablet result when remote cell topology is down
mission.description: Bug Report: empty ListShardTablet result when remote cell topology is down. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify vitess troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your vitess deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess -n vitess --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `%v", err)`

steps.title: Review vitess configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
kubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess
```
### Overview of the Issue

When remote cell topology is unreachable (example: in case of cutting internet cables), `vtctl` binary and `vtctlclient`/`vtctld GRPC api` return different results.

```yaml

  <summary>Unit test results</summary>
```

steps.title: Confirm Bug Report: empty ListShardTablet result when… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess -n vitess --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `%v", err)` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary: This adds tests to confirm and enforce the correct / expected behavior of the [`vtctldclient GetTablets` client command](https://vitess.io/docs/reference/programs/vtctldclient/vtctldclient_gettablets/) and the [`GetTablets` vtctlserverice.Vtctld RPC](https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/blob/3814b2a602e83641a8f8305ab0ffce9642516e57/proto/vtctlservice.proto#L164-L165) (which the client command

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with vitess installed or the issue environment reproducible.
